title: Trump says 'something happened' to Joe Biden during fateful debate
shortDescription: President Donald Trump commented on former President Joe Biden's mental acuity at a June 4 Oval Office event.

title: Kennedy Center staff told to remove Trump's name by June 12
shortDescription: Kennedy Center employees have been instructed to remove Donald Trump's name from signs and materials by June 12 to comply with a judge's order.

title: Two Dan Sullivans on Alaska ballot spark GOP concerns
shortDescription: Incumbent Alaska Sen. Dan Sullivan alleges voter confusion after another candidate with the same name joins the race, prompting GOP legal threats.

title: Trump unveils 'Trump Promenade' plan
shortDescription: President Trump unveiled a "Trump Promenade" plan behind the Lincoln Memorial to improve pedestrian access to the Potomac River.

title: Trump won't nominate Pulte for permanent DNI amid pushback
shortDescription: Pulte, 38, has generated bipartisan pushback, with senators questioning his qualifications to serve as director of national intelligence.

title: 'Trump Promenade': President touts addition to Lincoln Memorial
shortDescription: President Donald Trump plans to build a promenade at the Lincoln Memorial. An administration official said the concept is part of the original design of the National Mall.

title: Pew: Trump admin's X engagement surpasses Biden's. What does it mean?
shortDescription: Federal government's social media posts on X, formerly Twitter, are drawing far more engagement under Trump than Biden, new Pew data shows.

title: Republicans reject first effort to fully kill 'anti-weaponization' fund
shortDescription: Senate Democrats wanted to attach a measure to fully kill what critics are calling a "slush fund."

title: Hunter Biden says CNN's Jake Tapper is 'attacking' his mom Jill Biden
shortDescription: Hunter Biden publicly called out CNN’s Jake Tapper for "attacking my Mom," per a June 3 X post.

title: Commission considering Trump's arch flooded with negative comments
shortDescription: The Department of Interior says the purpose of the arch is to celebrate the triumphs of the American people and inspire patriotism and love of country

title: Fetterman breaks from Democrats, blasts Platner over sexting reports
shortDescription: While most Democrats have hesitated to criticize Maine's leading Democratic candidate for Senate, U.S. Sen. John Fetterman lambasted him on June 2.

title: Trump names Todd Blanche attorney general
shortDescription: President Donald Trump announced he plans to nominate Todd Blanche for attorney general in remarks at a June 3 private dinner.

title: Trump claims 'cheating' in California elections. Why results take time
shortDescription: The president has a history of lobbing accusations toward elections and voting. Here's why California's vote count takes time.

title: Former Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty
shortDescription: Former National Security Adviser John Bolton, a fierce critic of President Donald Trump, has reached a plea deal in the criminal case over his handling of classified information.

title: Trump lashes out at CNN's Kaitlan Collins again for 'never' smiling
shortDescription: Just after answering a question about the “anti-weaponization fund," Trump berated both CNN and correspondent Kaitlan Collins, calling them "corrupt."

title: Why did Washington DC Mayor Bowser call out the mayoral frontrunner?
shortDescription: Muriel Bowser criticized five DC Council members, including Janeese Lewis George, for refusing to support the extension of the city's youth curfew.

title: Trump critic John Bolton reaches plea deal in documents case
shortDescription: Former National Security Adviser John Bolton has reached a plea deal in the criminal case over his handling of documents.

title: Fetterman flips on eliminating filibuster for sake of minority voice
shortDescription: While U.S. Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) campaigned on eliminating the filibuster in 2022, now he says he's for it. Here's why he changed his opinion.

title: Steak 'n Shake celebrates after MAHA newcomer beats Trump frontrunner
shortDescription: Steak 'n Shake, the MAHA-aligned fast-food chain, celebrated a MAHA candidate's primary win over a Trump-backed incumbent congressman.

title: Trump blasts 'bad Republicans' who voted against Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump bashed the four House Republicans who sided with Democrats to support ending the Iran war.

title: For Trump, the setbacks keep piling up before birthday bash, midterms
shortDescription: A series of setbacks for Trump with Republicans in Congress and in the courts have plagued a president already struggling in polls.

title: Trump says he will nominate Todd Blanche for AG on permanent basis
shortDescription: President Trump said he plans to nominate Acting AG Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney, to permanently lead the Justice Department.

title: Firing some federal employees just got easier with this Trump EO
shortDescription: About 97% of reclassified positions are among the highest-ranking career positions such as directors, chiefs of staff and senior advisers.

title: Trump slams Kaitlan Collins's 'hatred' to her face
shortDescription: President Donald Trump attacked CNN's Kaitlan Collins, saying she has "hatred in her eyes."
